title: Luffy and Zoro Break Morgan’s Control
description: On pages 18–21, this part moves through Shells Town and the first clues about Zoro, Morgan, and Helmeppo’s abuse of power.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: HE GOT THROWN INTO PRISON 'CAUSE OF ME.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: CAPTAIN MORGAN'S SON HAD A BUNCH OF MEAN DOGS! THEY ATTACKED ME...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RORDOA ZOLO SAVED ME! BESIDES, THOSE DOGS WERE RUNNING LOOSE AND SCARING EVERYBODY IN TOWN!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: That's why Zolo is in prison...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: Because he hurt that guy's dog to save you?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: That makes sense!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Zolo's really scary, but he only goes after people with a price on their heads.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: AND HE WOULDN'T GET THROWN INTO PRISON FOR THAT!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: CAPTAIN MORGAN AND HIS SON ARE THE BAD ONES!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THEY PUT PEOPLE TO DEATH FOR NO REASON AT ALL! EVERYONE'S AFRAID OF THEM.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: HA HA HA HA HA HA HA! YOU'RE NOT BOWING YOUR HEADS LOW ENOUGH, SCUM! I'LL TELL MY FATHER ON ALL OF YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do you want to be jailed like RORONOA Zolo!?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: WE'RE GOING TO HOLD A PUBLIC EXECUTION FOR HIM IN THREE DAYS!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: WE'LL MAKE AN EXAMPLE OF HIM! I CAN HARDLY WAIT!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Three days?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: BUT... YOU MADE A PROMISE TO HIM!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WHAT? WHERE DID YOU HEAR ABOUT THAT?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THAT FROMISE WAS JUST A JOKE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HE'S JUST A STUPID BEAST FOR BELIEVING IT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HAHA HA!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Captain Morgan's idiot son promised me. All I've got to do is survive here for one month.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: LUFFY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: That guy is scum!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: STOP! CALM DOWN!!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: YOU WANT TO MAKE AN ENEMY OF THE NAVY, DO YOU!?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: KOBY, I'VE MADE MY DECISION!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I'm going to ask Zolo to join my crew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 3. Draw another circle below the first circle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How to draw the skull and crossbones

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 2. Draw three circles inside the circle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 1. DRAW ACIRCUE.

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
